calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-057 SD-024 x SD-025 interaction spike (env-free Test B) -- 4-arm DA-expansion x curiosity-drive ablation
items.note: Env-FREE ARC-057 interaction spike (Test B; sd_024_da_modulated_rbf_density.md Test Plan Phase 3). 4-arm 2x2 ablation over combined SD-024 (da_modulated_rbf_density) + SD-025 (curiosity_drive) in synthetic RBF/z_world space (766/767 style; no env, no agent commitment -> out of reach of the conversion/F-dominance ceiling). PASS = super-additive interaction (both-ON approach exceeds either single drive alone) with SD-025-alone at chance (uniform density -> no gradient). Value-follower confound isolated by (1) equal-mass A-vs-B design (value ~equal at both regions) and (2) LOAD-BEARING weight-zeroing persistence (766 discriminator); CEM scoring ARC-007-strict. experiment_purpose=diagnostic; NOT a supersession. GOV-REUSE-1: interaction contrast readout absent from all recorded runs (766 tested SD-024 alone, 767 SD-025 alone) -> run required. Prereqs V3-EXQ-766 + V3-EXQ-767 both PASS. On PASS: /failure-autopsy adjudicate before any ARC-057 governance action. Ecological Test C deferred-V4 (arc_057_ecological_env_decision_2026-07-16.md). Smoke: PASS (dry-run; interaction 0.50-0.55, persists under weight-zeroing, r1 density-gap ~18, r2 control 1.00).

items.title: MECH-423 cross-model super-additivity 3-arm ablation -- readiness-cosine-gate recalibration (magnitude-floored tolerance-band); supersedes 680d
items.note: Lettered iteration superseding V3-EXQ-680d: ONE design change = readiness-cosine-GATE RECALIBRATION (measurement/test-design fix, NOT a naive re-run). 680d's co-training stabiliser WORKED (0/5 PAIR seeds diverged; all world_R2 finite off-floor) but its readiness gate min(cos over 5 usable seeds)>=0 fired r1_grad_cosine_net_negative on -0.0371 gradient-ORTHOGONALITY noise and self-excluded a run whose suppressed FORK-2 verdict would PASS (3/5 seeds over margin 0.286; mean delta +0.35; PAIR>ISO 5/5 -- failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-680d_2026-06-15). FIX: replace min(cos)>=0 with a magnitude-floored / tolerance-band test -- |cos|<=COSINE_ORTHOGONAL_BAND (0.15, PRE-REGISTERED from 680d observed usable-seed cosine noise range -0.037..+0.051, max|cos|=0.051, ~3x) = near-orthogonal = readiness-MET so the super-additivity verdict RUNS; only a MAJORITY (>=MIN_SEEDS_NET_NEGATIVE=3/5 usable seeds) with cos<-BAND routes r1_grad_cosine_net_negative; only non-finite/diverged seeds route co_training_diverged. Emits n_diverged_seeds + band classification (net_neg/near_orth/net_pos) SEPARATE from the net-negative test. 680d co-training stabiliser (lower ENC_LR 1e-4 + 10-ep encoder warmup + non-finite-loss guard), inf/NaN cosine guard, R2_SCORE_FLOOR, hardened SD-of-delta+abs-floor margin ALL retained unchanged (n>=5). PRE-REGISTERED FORKS: (a) near-orthogonal/positive band -> readiness MET -> super-additivity verdict runs (the actual MECH-423 test; likely PASS); (b) cos<-BAND on >=3/5 usable seeds -> GENUINE negative-transfer readiness fail/substrate finding -> /implement-substrate (shared-latent objective reconciliation) or narrow MECH-423, do NOT re-queue; (c) n_usable<4 -> stabiliser regressed -> diagnose, do NOT iterate blindly. claim_ids=[MECH-423]; experiment_purpose=evidence (promotes NOTHING on its own; MECH-423 stays candidate). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout=recalibrated-gate super-additivity verdict, only INFORMALLY recomputable from 680d's superseded/non_contributory manifest (autopsy sec2), not a governance-weighted manifest -> run (user-directed). RE-DERIVE BRAKE: 2 prior MECH-423 non_contributory autopsies (680c/680d) but NOT braked -- 680d autopsy emits recommended_substrate_queue_entry action=none (NO upstream substrate to build); dominant diagnosis is a measurement/test-design defect on a NOW-STABLE substrate; user-confirmed routing to /queue-experiment 680e (2026-06-15). Ethics all-false/allow (frozen-representation MTL probe; no self-model/valence). Pinned ree-cloud-2 to reproduce 680d's cloud-class-proven (linux-x86_64-py3.10) co-training stability (a Mac run's differing numerics could spuriously route FORK 1). Smoke: dry-run PASS (no evidence leak); recalibrated-gate routing unit-verified (680d EXACT cosines -> FORK 2 verdict; genuine 3/5 net-neg -> FORK 3; single bad seed -> FORK 2).
